name: AU Road Transport Intelligence — CSV + Interactive Map
description: Australian Road Transport Intelligence: 97 verified fleet operators with parent company ownership, HQ location (latitude/longitude), fleet size band, and primary freight type. Operator-level data ideal for: fleet leasing companies, fuel card providers, GPS tracking vendors, insurance brokers, and logistics software vendors.
